title: Ceroba GUI
description: A Minecraft GUI resourcepack themed after the character Ceroba from Undertale Yellow.
body:
A Minecraft resourcepack themed after the character 'Ceroba' from Undertale Yellow. This changes the GUIs and buttons, and also changes the carved pumpkin's item model to match Ceroba's mask. (does not affect block model of the pumpkin. If you wish to display the mask, use either an armor stand or an item frame.) If you'd like to enjoy the mask without obscuring your vision too much, check out [this pack!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cerobagui-clearvision) ## Mask recipe datapack [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cerobagui-recipe) (Under review, coming soon!) ## Mask give commands
1.21-1.21.3 - Kanako Mask - /give @s carved_pumpkin[custom_model_data=1] - Sunshine AU Mask - /give @s carved_pumpkin[custom_model_data=2] - Mask Stand - /give @s carved_pumpkin[custom_model_data=3]
1.21.4+ - Kanako Mask - /give @a carved_pumpkin[item_model="ceroba_gui:kanako_mask_uty"] - Sunshine AU Mask - /give @a carved_pumpkin[item_model="ceroba_gui:kanako_mask_sunshine"] - Mask Stand - /give @a carved_pumpkin[item_model="ceroba_gui:mask_stand"]
## Mod Compatability - Appleskin ## Cerdits - @jaezmien.com on Bluesky | Appleskin compatability
